item.title: The Death Spiral of Imgur (and Every App You Love)
item.description: I felt as Imgur’s wife of six years, it was time you heard about our marital problems. Every platform dies the same way, and you may have noticed right now that Imgur is likely deep in its own collapse. I sat down with my longtime friend TylerFromTheInternet to talk about “Ensh*ttification” - how apps hook us, bleed us, and then betray us. https://youtu.be/jfWcoJxo7C8 Want to know what has been going on here the past couple months? In the full video, we break down what’s happening to Imgur right now (13:27), the mass staff firings from MediaLabs (19:17), when Imgur literally broke (21:24), and how banning, blackouts, and even “The Boob Phase” (30:25) fit into the bigger picture. Along the way we hit Fark, iMDB, Reddit’s failures, and even why Mitt Romney somehow hates Tyler. It’s funny, furious, and maybe a little depressing - but if you’ve ever loved this site, you’ll want to see how it all fits together.
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Internet archives are so vital right now
item.description: FP edit : please donate to https://archive.org/donate or https://archive.ph/ if you want to do some good! https://www.ojp.gov/pdffiles1/nij/306123.pdf does not exist anymore https://bsky.app/profile/malmer.com/post/3lypvmsr2qc2u first appeared to notice it on on 13th September. However it is archived here : https://web.archive.org/web/20250911165140/https://www.ojp.gov/pdffiles1/nij/306123.pdf which titled as: Steven Chermak et al., “What NIJ Research Tells Us About Domestic Terrorism,” NIJ Journal 285, June 2024, https://nij.ojp.gov/topics/articles/what-nij-research-tells-us-about-domestic-terrorism Their excuse is “The Department of Justice's Office of Justice Programs is currently reviewing its websites and materials in accordance with recent Executive Orders and related guidance,” reads a message on the page where the study was formerly hosted. “During this review, some pages and publications will be unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.”

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1476 (bleak meme)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
A friend of mine who's a teacher is getting doxxed, fired, and banned from working in her town by the schoolboard courtesy of posting a "celebratory" Kirk meme. She is considering moving to another state. Welcome to rural MAGA Arizona.
Also, someone stole my laundry basket at the apartment laundry room. I had to carry all my laundry back to my apartment by hand. Who the fuck steals a laundry basket?! It wasn't sitting there for more than a half hour.
Also im worried about car repairs.
And how I'll survive in general. But whatever. I believed I'd have a job at the start of September so I stayed instead of moving to a city I hated or out of state so its my own idiot fault for trusting my body, brain, or both of them.
I saw that the county jail is hiring prison guards, I could just... sell my morals and values about human lives down the drain like so much of the rest of America.
Anyway.
Thanks I hate it. Didn't want it, didn't ask for it.
They've been in so long that not even the deaths of these people will halt the juggernaut. You'd need an asteroid at this point.
I feel so useless as a resistance person.
This is why I like both the Tides of History Podcast and the British History Podcast.
Sure, let me just fucking go out and find one at Walmart. And insurance won't cover it anyway.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "Okay. Okay. Okay. Okay." [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: On my way to get bottom surgery!
item.description: In two days I will be getting vaginoplasty. I started this process back in March of 2023. It’s wild to think that it’s literally now less than 48 hours away. Over the last 2.5 years it’s been acquiring mental health letters, attending consults, filling out countless forms, going to therapy sessions, and care/travel prepping just to get this surgery. I’m so excited and also very anxious that something is going to happen to delay it. But I know all will likely go well and it will be over before I know it. Wish me luck everyone, I love you all.
item.dc:creator: transomware

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Santa
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Sleeping bean Sorry for missing yesterday's post. Things have really not been going well. Luna is currently in need of immediately vet care, and we don't get paid for another week. I have spent the morning in tears and listening to her grunt and wheeze is really hurting me. If I don't post for a few days, assume that thing have not gone well and I will be back when I can. See you all tomorrow, I hope. EDIT: I've got an emergency appointment for Lulu with her vet. Our guinea pig vet is amazing and is very familiar with Lulu. Some kind soul has donated to us to help out and this is why we can afford this visit. I cannot thank the user enough. Everyone who donates is appreciated, but the user I'm specifically thanking knows who they are, I am sure. You are all amazing and I cannot thank you enough. I will have updates for Lulu in about 3 hours, or with tomorrow's post. Once more.. I cannot thank this community enough. You are all the bright shining light we need in this world of utter chaos. EDIT #2: After an emergency vet visit today, it looks like Luna has lost a lot of weight. The vet is very concerned. We're hoping it's something viral and she has been prescribed an antibiotic. But the reality is that she is a very old girl and we may just be providing her with end of life care. She may have a cancer or something else that we're not able to see externally. Besides her weight loss, she's got a little bit of a fever and we're hoping that whatever is bothering her is a minor infection. However, like I told the doctor, so long as she keeps showing me that will to go on, I will do everything I can for her. She's my baby.
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet
